title: GAR-391 The Strongest Black Gal Legend Aiba Reika Premier BEST - Reika Aiba
overview: Finally, the premium BEST of No.1 younger sister black gal Aiba Reika is here! A must-have item where you can see everyone's Aiba-chan's dynamic trajectory at GARCON! The charm of the black gal Aiba Reika is fully condensed into one work!
